analytic_flops.note: per-layer (B=1) Megatron-convention FLOPs at capture seq; site multiplies by cr_layer_counts x GA x DP

provenance.note: cr in graphed_crs_estimated_from_cr4 were CUDA-graph/stream-captured (compute not visible in trace); their breakdown is copied from cr=4 as an estimate. Re-run those cr with graph capture disabled for exact numbers.

kernels.name: void at::native::vectorized_gather_kernel<16, long>(char*, char*, long*, int, lo

optimizer.note: measured one-layer optimizer-step kernel time on this rank; the site scales by per-rank params

comm.note: EP dispatch/combine are memory_bound rows inside moe; informational
